description: Communal accounts, probably. In Arabic script, Judaeo-Arabic, and Greek/Coptic numerals. One of the Arabic entries is in the hand of Shelomo b. Yishay the Nasi, as he writes underneath. Dating: 13th century. (Information in part from CUDL.)
description_he: רשימה או טבלה בArabic, Greek/Coptic Numerals, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
